title: Builders Jetpack
description: The ideal jetpack for building. (Requires Fabric)
body:
# Builders Jetpack
Builders Jetpack is the ideal jetpack mod for building.

## Mechanics
The jetpack let's you fly at the cost of fuel, consuming more fuel if you are flying faster.
To start/stop flying, double tap space.
Fuel is shown as percentage in the action bar, and can be inserted into the jetpack by right clicking the jetpack fuel item.

## Appearance
When flying, the jetpack emits smoke particles below:
![Active jetpack with particles below](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/L524D8Os/images/a314cb72ef142e6ab91d8976a59610f33611dc4a.png)

## Crafting
You can craft the jetpack itself using 1x copper ingot, 2x copper block, 2x firework of any type, and 1x netherite chestplate in this shape:
![Jetpack crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/L524D8Os/images/fda3c2e7173c221b9cd6b2486c3e8e97633ddefb.png)

You can craft the jetpack fuel item using 1x lava (the bucket will be returned), 2x gunpowder, and 1x leather. This recipe is shapeless.
![Jetpack fuel crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/L524D8Os/images/d610d017dd53e2a164472940134ec99f55ac8044.png)
